message:
docs(readme): fix df.xs("string") — needs &IndexLabel (br-pizo3 / fd90.119)

fd90.119: line 521 had df.xs("2024-01-15")? but
crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:26531 declares:
  pub fn xs(&self, key: &IndexLabel) -> Result<Self, FrameError>

xs takes &IndexLabel, not &str. User would hit:
  error[E0308]: expected reference '&IndexLabel', found '&str'

Fix: use the From<&str> blanket on IndexLabel
(crates/fp-index/src/lib.rs:97) so a literal can coerce via .into():
  df.xs(&"2024-01-15".into())?

Inline note documents the IndexLabel contract for users unfamiliar
with the type.

Pure README change. No code impact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
